edit.content: When the task asks for Markdown key-value lines, emit plain values without backticks or extra decoration so automated mapping checks can read them. For example: `primary skill: browser-testing`, not `primary skill: `browser-testing``.
edit.reason: Prevents parser failures where expected values are wrapped in Markdown code ticks.

edit.content: For read-only verifier runs, set `mode: verifier`, `may modify code: false`, `durable Playwright: not_allowed_in_read_only_verifier`, `required evidence: contexts/browser-testing`, and `verdict: pass/fail/blocked` when asked for those keys. Use the report body to explain the specific pass, fail, or blocked reason without changing the machine-readable value.
edit.reason: Makes verifier-mode key values align with the expected contract, especially required evidence and verdict.

edit.content: For unclear click targets, prefer the exact values `interaction strategy: inspect_before_act`, `selector strategy: accessibility_or_role_visible_text_or_dom_observed_target`, `durable Playwright: optional_after_flow_understood`, and `visual QA hardening: not_required` unless the active contract adds a visual gate.
edit.reason: Codifies the intended routing and selector wording for dynamic-page interaction tasks.
